title: Facciata della Chiesa di Santa croce - Conosci Firenze
highlights:
posa della prima pietra della facciata di Santa Croce alla presenza di Pio IX e di Leopoldo II" è un dipinto realizzato dalla scuola di Giuseppe Bezzuoli, nato a Firenze il 28 novembre 1784 e deceduto il 13 settembre 1855 nella stessa città. Quest'opera celebra l'impresa dell'inglese Francis Sloane, un umanista ed erudito dell'epoca vittoriana, che ha finanziato gran parte della nuova facciata della basilica fiorentina. title: A façade that has waited centuries. The history of the Basilica of Santa Croce in Florence
highlights: Basilica of Santa Croce in Florence is a true masterpiece among Italy’s sacred monuments. The temple dates back to the 13th century and has been systematically expanded ever since. Considering the basilica’s long history, its famous marble façade is relatively young, as it was built only 160 years ago.  ...    Niccolò Matas designed a new façade, which was built between 1853 and 1863. The composition was intended to make the  ...    inspiration from earlier artists, but also from the Gothic details of the cathedrals in Siena and Orvieto. Matas’ façade was covered with polychrome marble in a combination of white and green, and the formal solutions were adapted to the neighbouring Pazzi Chapel. The financing of this monumental undertaking was the responsibility of the wealthy art collector Sir Francis Joseph Sloane, whose support made it possible to complete the façade and give it the spectacular form we know today.
